path.style: stroke: url('#gradient-0'); paint-order: fill; fill-rule: nonzero; fill: url('#gradient-2-0'); filter: url('#inner-shadow-filter-1');

fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: url('#drop-shadow-filter-0') url('#outline-filter-0') url('#inner-shadow-filter-2') url('#gaussian-blur-filter-4') url('#gaussian-blur-filter-5'); opacity: 0.51; mix-blend-mode: soft-light;

fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); filter: url('#inner-shadow-filter-2') url('#inner-shadow-filter-4') url('#drop-shadow-filter-1') url('#gaussian-blur-filter-1') url('#gaussian-blur-filter-2') url('#gaussian-blur-filter-3') url('#drop-shadow-filter-0'); opacity: 0.5;
filter: url('#inner-shadow-filter-2') url('#inner-shadow-filter-4') url('#drop-shadow-filter-1'); fill: url('#gradient-3-0');
